parameters: ※ーーーイベントはじめーーー※
※ーーーイベントおわりーーー※
Want us to break you into Maximus Castle? It's a one-way trip,
so make sure you're all ready.
Hey! Headed to Maximus Castle? I can get you there, express!
It's pretty far from here to Maximus Castle. We should get a
gardemon to give us a lift.
What the hell was that massive bird!? This world's crazy!
I came here to negotiate since I figured I could make some money
off Mark 6's technology, but I can't do anything like this.
Mark 6 is really messed up right now. Some people are even trying
to get a civil war going.
A bunch of people have been going missing too. If you ask me,
the transfer hallway's real suspicious. You should avoid it.
I miss my old world... At least it didn't have giant monsters
That made me jump out of my skin! To think a flock of Ultra Beasts
would show up right next to us!
I was so scared they'd attack us! I'm not into bestiality!♪
I liked the manager. It's such a shame we won't be able to
The manager's disappeared... Looks like this'll be my last job here.
Was... Was the manager really a bad guy? I feel like behind that
shady smile was a real kernel of kindness.
